title: Anticodon
summary: The 3-nucleotide sequence on molecules/trna that base-pairs with a complementary molecules/codon on mRNA. The anticodon-codon pairing brings the correct amino acid (carried at the tRNA's other end) to the ribosome. Pairing follows the standard rules: A↔U, G↔C (with some flexibility at the 3rd position — "wobble").
